en: Welcome to the Voice of America's NewsWords.
ko: Voice of America의 NewsWords에 오신 것을 환영합니다.

en: Crucial. The men were lost for days when a U.S. Navy aircraft spotted a message.
ko: 남성들은 며칠간 실종되었다가 미 해군 항공기가 메시지를 발견했습니다.

en: The word HELP written in palm fronds.
ko: 야자수 잎으로 쓴 HELP라는 글자였습니다. 구조 작전을 이끈

en: The U.S. Coast Guard, which led the rescue effort, said the message was a crucial factor in their discovery.
